title: Xtra Creamy Mediterranean Celeriac Pasta
description: A tangy and velvety Mediterranean dish featuring celeriac and a pasta water emulsion, perfect for a festive vegetarian meal.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic until fragrant.
Add the diced celeriac to the skillet and cook until tender, about 10 minutes.
Stir in the lemon juice and vegetable broth, and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Use an immersion blender to puree the celeriac mixture until smooth.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet, tossing to combine with the celeriac sauce.
Stir in the crumbly feta cheese until melted and well combined.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then garnish with chopped parsley.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
